caption: The video features a man sitting in front of a microphone, likely participating in a podcast or radio show titled "Boss Talk 101." He is wearing a green t-shirt with the text "I ON NEVER DO SHIT WITHOUT WORK" and a green cap. The setting appears to be a clothing store, as evidenced by the racks of clothes and mannequins in the background. The walls are adorned with numerous framed photographs, adding a personal touch to the environment. The man is engaged in conversation, speaking into the microphone while wearing headphones, suggesting he is either hosting or being interviewed on the show. The overall atmosphere is casual yet professional, blending the retail setting with the audio production elements.
